case_title: SERRANO RAMON VS LASARIN JUAN JR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SERRANO RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT LASARIN JUAN JR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
